label: ChurnZero
description: Connect ChurnZero to track customer engagement scores, churn risk, and account health data.

form.title: Connect ChurnZero
form.subtitle: Paste your API Key and App Key to give Anton access to your ChurnZero customer engagement data.

methods.label: API Key + App Key
methods.description: Paste two paired credentials from your ChurnZero admin panel — an API Key and an App Key. No OAuth setup required; works immediately once both keys are in place.
methods.how_to:
## Locate your ChurnZero API Key and App Key

ChurnZero uses two separate credentials that work together — an **API Key** and an **App Key**. Both live in different sections of the Admin panel.

### Retrieve your API Key

1. Log in to ChurnZero as an administrator.
2. Click your avatar / account menu in the top-right corner and select **Admin**.
3. Navigate to **Admin → Integrations → API**.
4. Copy the **API Key** displayed on that page.

### Retrieve your App Key

1. Still in the **Admin** area, navigate to **Admin → Settings → App Settings** (sometimes listed as **Setup → App Settings**).
2. Copy the **App Key** (also called the App ID or Account Key depending on your ChurnZero version).

### Paste into Anton

1. Paste the **API Key** into the field below.
2. Paste the **App Key** into the second field below.
3. Click **Submit** — Anton will validate both keys against your ChurnZero instance.

### Notes

- Both keys are required; neither works without the other.
- If you do not see the API page, confirm your user role has **Admin** or **API Access** permissions.
- Keys do not expire automatically, but regenerating them in ChurnZero will invalidate the old pair — update Anton if you rotate them.
- Your ChurnZero instance URL (subdomain) is also required so Anton can route requests to the correct environment.

fields.name: instance_url
fields.label: ChurnZero Instance URL
fields.description: The base URL of your ChurnZero environment, e.g. https://yourcompany.churnzero.net

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found under Admin → Integrations → API in your ChurnZero admin panel.

fields.name: app_key
fields.label: App Key
fields.description: Found under Admin → Settings → App Settings in your ChurnZero admin panel.
